sample.title: What You'll Get

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: How often will I receive emails?
faq.a1: You choose! Get instant alerts for hot deals, a daily digest, or a weekly roundup. Customize it in your preferences.
faq.a2: Yes! Our newsletter is 100% free, forever. We make money through affiliate commissions when you book, at no extra cost to you.
faq.a3: Absolutely. Every email has a one-click unsubscribe link. No questions asked, no guilt trips.
faq.a4: Never. We hate spam as much as you do. Your email stays with us, period.
faq.q5: Can I filter deals by destination?
faq.a5: Yes! Set your preferred origins and destinations, max price, deal types, and more. Only get deals you actually care about.

about.title: We Help You Travel
about.subtitle: NomadSteals is your daily source for hand-picked travel deals. We use data and experience to find deals that are actually worth your time.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: NomadSteals started with a simple frustration: finding good travel deals was too hard. There were too many mediocre "deals" out there, and too much noise to sift through.
story.p2: We built NomadSteals to be the travel deals site we always wanted. Every deal on our site is hand-reviewed by our team. We analyze pricing data to calculate our proprietary Value Score — so you know when a deal is actually exceptional, not just "on sale."
story.p3: We're travelers ourselves. We've booked error fares to Asia, scored luxury hotels at budget prices, and found hidden gem destinations. Now we share that knowledge with you.

valueScore.title: The Value Score Difference
valueScore.subtitle: Not all "deals" are created equal. A 30% discount on an already-inflated price isn't really a deal. That's why we created the Value Score.
valueScore.historicalDesc: We compare current prices to 12+ months of historical data
valueScore.seasonalDesc: We account for peak vs. off-peak pricing
valueScore.routeDesc: We know what's typical for each route and destination
valueScore.qualityDesc: We consider the airline/hotel reputation in our scoring

team.title: What We Do
team.huntersDesc: Our team scours the web 24/7 for the best deals
team.nerdsDesc: We analyze historical pricing to calculate Value Scores
team.travelersDesc: We're travelers too — we get it

money.title: How We Make Money
money.intro: Transparency matters to us. Here's how NomadSteals stays free:
money.affiliateDesc: When you book through our links, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This doesn't affect our deal selection — we feature deals based on Value Score, not commission rates.
money.premiumDesc: We're building a premium tier with exclusive deals and features. Our free newsletter will always exist.
money.outro: We will never feature a deal just because it pays us more. Our reputation depends on finding you genuinely great deals.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a deal tip? Spotted an error? Want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.

cta.title: Ready to Find Amazing Deals?
